name: domain_collab_result
description: Report the domain-collab workflow decision in structured format. Call this tool to record your analysis plan.

matched_domains.description: List of domain IDs identified from the requirement

action.description: The action to take based on domain count: proceed-collab (2+), redirect-requirements-elicitation (1), prompt-more-info (0)

round2_skip_domains.description: Domains to skip in Round 2 (impact_level: none AND no inbound risks)
